title: Love Will Tear Us Apart
why_this_song: Love Will Tear Us Apart by Joy Division (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Then love, love will tear us apart again"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Then love, love will tear us apart again"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Yet there's still this appeal that we've kept through our lives"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Love, love will tear us apart again
Why is the bedroom so cold? You've turned away on your side
Is my timing that flawed? Our respect runs so dry
Yet there's still this appeal that we've kept through our lives
Love, love will tear us apart again

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tear" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tear" na música inteira?

excerpts.text: When routine bites hard and ambitions are low
Then love, love will tear us apart again
Love, love will tear us apart again

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Love Will Tear Us Apart" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Love Will Tear Us Apart" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Love Will Tear Us Apart" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Love Will Tear Us Apart" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Love Will Tear Us Apart" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Love Will Tear Us Apart"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
